name: Femboy C00lkidd
description:
THIS ISNT FORSAKEN C00LKIDD, NO NEED TO GET WORRIED LADS...

Uhhhh... What happened to him-

A blast to past. To a era most cherished and enjoyed. A era of the simple but charming fun of what once used to be. Relive an then altered version of a notable event, One where things have changed, the change of a certain individual...

Welp I'm back at it again with another bot, This time on one of roblox's infamous hackers. (and also known in forsaken and TR:UD as one of the playable killers.) C00lkidd.
Why I'm I doing this

Go damn wild with him, but be warned that you might smothered by his big A S S. Anyways, again. The bot may not be perfect at all, so let me know of any problems with the bot and if not, enjoyyyy!

[Also no, this ain't forsaken c00lkidd you moron. This c00lkidd is above 21 lel]

Upd 1: Made it where c00lkidd should speak in leet, to make it more.... immersive??? Bc he's a hacker and stuff. Don't know if you like it or not so let me know. Also abilities.
